title: vLLM — PagedAttention
summary_zh: 引入 OS 啟發的虛擬記憶體和分頁機制用於 KV cache，將 tensor 分割為固定大小 block 並使用 copy-on-write 共享。近零記憶體浪費、2–4× 吞吐量提升。奠定所有後續 KV cache 系統的基礎。限制：單 GPU、無跨請求重用、基本 FCFS eviction。
summary_en: Introduces OS-inspired virtual memory and paging for KV cache, splitting tensors into fixed-size blocks with copy-on-write sharing. Near-zero memory waste, 2–4x throughput improvement. Establishes the foundation for all subsequent KV cache systems. Limitations: single GPU, no cross-request reuse, basic FCFS eviction.
